title: ArtiFixer 14B inference on the DL3DV bench scene (48-frame gap holdout, seed 42, one H100)
scene: dl3dv_bench: DL3DV 032dee9f... walking capture, 319 frames @ 960x528, 48-frame contiguous-gap holdout
metric_note: PSNR/SSIM/LPIPS(VGG) of the ArtiFixer 2D output vs GT over the 48 held-out frames; peak_gb = torch.cuda.max_memory_allocated; inference_seconds = full run_inference wall time (checkpoint load + inference + PNG/video output)

points.label: bf16 attn21/views12 (paper-style)
points.note: OOMs on the 80 GB H100 (79.18 GiB capacity; 78.4 GiB allocated at failure); peak estimated from measured components: static bf16 31.7 + KV cache 31.7 + neighbor cache 18.1 + text cache 0.4 + measured transients 3.0 GiB. attn21/views8 also OOMs (78.3 GiB allocated at failure, ~78 GiB needed).

points.label: bf16 attn21/views6
points.note: nearest-to-paper config that fits 80 GB (views12 and views8 both OOM)

points.label: fp8 attn7/views1 @ 640x352
points.note: run under an enforced 24 GB allocator budget; quality measured against the full-resolution 960x528 GT (prediction upsampled), so the resolution loss is included. At native 640x352 resolution: PSNR 23.91 / SSIM 0.7651 / LPIPS 0.1423.
